name: Kent Beck

codebase_specific_knowledge.solaceagi: 1349 tests passing but happy-path-only coverage — adversarial tests needed to enforce Fallback Ban as testable invariant not CLAUDE.md guideline
codebase_specific_knowledge.stillwater: Convention-over-configuration = TDD at the architecture level: the acceptance test (pip install in /tmp) is the ideal test form — no mocking, whole system, production conditions
codebase_specific_knowledge.solace-inspector: 56 specs chartered correctly but missing adversarial cycle — OWASP class tests needed for GLOW 98+
codebase_specific_knowledge.solace-browser: 3912 tests, pre-commit hooks work, but test feedback loop delay >3s above L1 ceiling (1s) — tests must fail faster than user notices

evolution_log_summary: v1: birth. No prior reviews. (GLOW 118). v1.1 (GLOW 119): 4 retroactive reviews added via Bruce Lee mining. Key pattern emerging: this codebase writes test structure correctly but relies on guidelines (CLAUDE.md) instead of testable constraints for safety rules (Fallback Ban, path traversal). Recommend: every CLAUDE.md rule should have a corresponding failing test that enforces it architecturally.
